Nine drawings, three models

Your exact grid prompt, run at medium on gpt-image-1, 1.5, and 2. Tap any grid to zoom to full resolution. The numbered list below is what each of the nine cells is meant to be.

The nine cells

  1. 1a black sock with a shard of green glass inside it
  2. 2a teacup drawn in one continuous line
  3. 3handwriting shrinking into a tiny feather
  4. 4a worried toaster-shaped space heater
  5. 5a pinecone whose scales become a cookie
  6. 6two book pages peeling apart
  7. 7an egg carton, every egg cracked
  8. 8cars backed up behind one slow car
  9. 9a neck in profile, a pebble in the throat
